analysis.name: Micron Technology (Backpack Securities)
analysis.summary: MU代币是Solana上1:1锚定美光科技股票的通证化资产，近期因美光财报超预期大涨16%，但代币本身24h仅微涨0.05%，流动性极低，交易量仅10万美元，市值约41.8万美元。基本面由股票支撑，但链上交易深度差，不适合大资金操作。

recommendation.invalidation: 代币价格与MU股票脱钩，或流动性进一步枯竭

catalysts: 美光科技财报超预期，股价大涨16%
通证化资产提供链上股票敞口，可能吸引加密用户

总供应量3723枚，流通量相同，无通胀
美光科技为全球半导体巨头，基本面稳健
marketRead: 24h价格微涨0.05%，远低于股票16%涨幅，显示脱钩
交易量仅10.4万美元，流动性极低，买卖价差可能很大
无K线数据，无法判断趋势
risks: 流动性极低，大额交易易滑点
代币价格与股票脱钩风险

市场深度不足，可能无法及时平仓
watchlist: 代币与股票价差是否收敛
Backpack Securities的赎回机制是否顺畅
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，流动性数据缺失

profile.name: Micron Technology (Backpack Securities)
profile.description: Micron Technology (Backpack Securities) (MU) is a tokenized security on the Solana blockchain that provides direct, 1:1 economic exposure to MU equity. Each MU token is fully collateralized by one real-world share of Micron Technology stock held in regulated custody. The asset is issued by Backpack Securities, a regulated U.S. brokerage, in partnership with the Sunrise tokenization infrastructure. Holders can redeem their tokens for actual Micron Technology shares and transfer them to traditional brokerage accounts via established financial rails.
